title: Breathable Horse Armor
description: Retextures of all the horse armor types! Let your horse be more visible without sacrificing its style.
body:
Do you struggle to see the horse hiding underneath that horse armor? Do you wish it could still have some style? This retexture of the horse armors means to address your issue.

My version of the leather, iron, gold and diamond horse armors allow your horse's colors and patterns to be more visible while still maintaining some flair. The icon for the item is unchanged.

_Note: this is my first attempt at a resource pack born out of my own need for different horse armor vibes. May not be perfect._
